allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add design doc for training loss logging and visualization

Features:
- CSV logging of training and validation losses
- Automatic plot generation with multi-subplot layout
- Discriminator start marker at 20000 steps
- Configurable logging frequency

Includes error handling, usage examples, and dependencies.
EOF
\)")
Bash(gawk NR>1 && $18!="" {step=$1; psnr=$18; lpips=$19} END {print "non-EMA: step="step, "PSNR="psnr, "LPIPS="lpips}:*)
